final:
module thermal_sensor_calibration (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] raw_temp,
    input wire [7:0] offset,
    output reg [7:0] calibrated_temp
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            calibrated_temp <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            calibrated_temp <= raw_temp + offset;
        end
    end
endmodule
